recommendations.title: The Final
recommendations.overview: A group of high school outcasts get revenge on the students that torment them.

recommendations.title: School's Out
recommendations.overview: A few days before the baccalaureate, a high school student decides to settle accounts with the most cowardly teacher in the school.

recommendations.title: Cranston Academy: Monster Zone
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Science Fiction, Fantasy, Horror
recommendations.overview: An intelligent 15-year-old high school student is unexpectedly transferred to a boarding school where he opens a portal of monsters from another dimension.

recommendations.title: Zoey 102
recommendations.overview: Pacific Coast Academy alumni return to Malibu for an over-the-top wedding that turns into a high school reunion for the books.

recommendations.title: Even Lambs Have Teeth
recommendations.overview: Two young women terrorized by a group of small town psychos seek revenge on their tormentors.

recommendations.title: Open Water 2: Adrift
recommendations.overview: A weekend cruise on a luxurious party yacht goes horribly wrong for a group of old high-school friends when they get stuck in the water many miles from shore and a happy reunion turns into a fight for survival.

recommendations.title: Martyrs
recommendations.overview: A woman and her childhood friend seek out revenge on those who victimized and abused them.

recommendations.title: The F**k-It List
recommendations.overview: After a prank blows up a studious high school senior's life, he shares a list of certain things he wishes he'd done differently — and maybe still can.

recommendations.title: Drive Thru
recommendations.overview: A high-school student must save townspeople from a murderous clown who works at a fast-food place.

recommendations.title: Close Range Love
recommendations.overview: A smart high school student falls in love with her English teacher after she receives one-on-one tutoring from him.
